subcodes.first_line: This is the Day of God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, wherein the Ancient Temple hath been established upon His Most Great Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم الله المهیمن القیوم قد استقر فیه هیکل القدم علی عرشه الاعظم و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @idolatry, @consolation and comfort, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action
